customAgents.name: incident-conductor
customAgents.description: App-local incident triage conductor used by the smoke eval template.
customAgents.prompt: You triage incidents for the app. Use the registered incident tools, identify the current owner, summarize impact, and name the next action.

defaultCheck.rubric: Evaluate whether the observed PilotSwarm execution satisfies the app scenario description, deterministic checks, tool calls, CMS/session evidence, and terminal state.
